name: Observe and Report
short_description: The ultimate surveillance game. Monitor camera feeds solo, team up in multiplayer, or versus friends. Detect anomalies, report suspicious activities, and ensure security across diverse locations. Your watchful eyes make the difference!
detailed_description:
OBSERVE and REPORT

Observe and Report builds upon the popular observation genre with new content and the ability to join, or verse, friends. Watch the security cameras for signs of anomalies as you try to survive the night. Don't let the anomalies linger too long or you'll run will end sooner than expected.

CO-OP

Try the online CO-OP mode with friends as you attempt to find all the anomalies together. Every new set of eyes increases your chance to survive.

VERSUS

Tired of helping your friends and want to show off your skills? Observe and Report has an online Versus mode where you compete to see who can report the most anomalies.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
